{{Extend "layout"}} {{Block "title"}}{{`Docker 信息`|$.T}}{{/Block}} {{Block "breadcrumb"}} {{Super}}
  • {{`Docker 信息`|$.T}}
    • {{/Block}} {{Block "main"}}
    {{"仓库登录"|$.T}}

    {{`Docker 信息`|$.T}}

    {{$detail := $.Stored.info}} {{if $detail.GenericResources}} {{- range $k,$v:=$detail.GenericResources -}} {{- end -}} {{end}} {{- $registry := $detail.RegistryConfig -}} {{$plugins := $detail.Plugins}}
    ID {{$detail.ID}}
    {{`容器总数`|$.T}} {{$detail.Containers}} {{`容器状态`|$.T}} {{`运行中`|$.T}}: {{$detail.ContainersRunning}}   {{`已暂停`|$.T}}: {{$detail.ContainersPaused}}   {{`已停止`|$.T}}: {{$detail.ContainersStopped}}
    {{`镜像总数`|$.T}} {{$detail.Images}}
    Driver {{$detail.Driver}} DriverStatus {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.DriverStatus}} {{index $vv 0}}{{index $vv 1}} {{end}}
    MemoryLimit {{if $detail.MemoryLimit}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}} SwapLimit {{if $detail.SwapLimit}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    KernelMemory {{if $detail.KernelMemory}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}} KernelMemoryTCP {{if $detail.KernelMemoryTCP}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    CPUCfsPeriod {{if $detail.CPUCfsPeriod}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}} CPUCfsQuota {{if $detail.CPUCfsQuota}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    CPUShares {{if $detail.CPUShares}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}} CPUSet {{if $detail.CPUSet}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    PidsLimit {{if $detail.PidsLimit}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}} IPv4Forwarding {{if $detail.IPv4Forwarding}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    BridgeNfIptables {{if $detail.BridgeNfIptables}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}} BridgeNfIP6tables {{if $detail.BridgeNfIP6tables}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    Debug {{if $detail.Debug}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}} OomKillDisable {{if $detail.OomKillDisable}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    NFd {{$detail.NFd}} NGoroutines {{$detail.NGoroutines}}
    SystemTime {{$detail.SystemTime}} LoggingDriver {{$detail.LoggingDriver}}
    CgroupDriver {{$detail.CgroupDriver}} CgroupVersion {{$detail.CgroupVersion}}
    NEventsListener {{$detail.NEventsListener}} KernelVersion {{$detail.KernelVersion}}
    OperatingSystem {{$detail.OperatingSystem}} OSVersion {{$detail.OSVersion}}
    OSType {{$detail.OSType}} Architecture {{$detail.Architecture}}
    IndexServerAddress {{$detail.IndexServerAddress}}
    NCPU {{$detail.NCPU}} MemTotal {{$detail.MemTotal|FormatBytes}}
    DockerRootDir {{$detail.DockerRootDir}} HttpProxy {{$detail.HTTPProxy}}
    HttpsProxy {{$detail.HTTPSProxy}} NoProxy {{$detail.NoProxy}}
    Name {{$detail.Name}} ServerVersion {{$detail.ServerVersion}}
    Labels {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.Labels}} {{if gt $kk 0}} / {{end}} {{$vv}} {{end}} ExperimentalBuild {{if $detail.ExperimentalBuild}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    Runtimes {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.Runtimes}} {{end}}
    {{if eq $detail.DefaultRuntime $kk}} {{`默认`|$.T}} {{end}} {{$kk}} Path: {{$vv.Path}}
    Args: {{$vv.Path}} {{range $k,$v:=$vv.Args}} {{$v}}  {{end}}
    LiveRestoreEnabled {{if $detail.LiveRestoreEnabled}} YES {{else}} NO {{end}} Isolation {{$detail.Isolation}}
    InitBinary {{$detail.InitBinary}} ContainerdCommit ID: {{$detail.ContainerdCommit.ID}}
    Expected: {{$detail.ContainerdCommit.Expected}}
    InitCommit ID: {{$detail.InitCommit.ID}}
    Expected: {{$detail.InitCommit.Expected}}     		RuncCommit ID: {{$detail.RuncCommit.ID}}
    Expected: {{$detail.RuncCommit.Expected}}
    SecurityOptions {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.SecurityOptions}} {{$vv}}
    {{end}}     		Warnings {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.Warnings}} {{$kk}}. {{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    GenericResources
    NamedResourceSpec {{if $v.NamedResourceSpec}} {{$v.NamedResourceSpec.Kind}}: {{$v.NamedResourceSpec.Value}} {{end}} DiscreteResourceSpec {{if $v.DiscreteResourceSpec}} {{$v.DiscreteResourceSpec.Kind}}: {{$v.DiscreteResourceSpec.Value}} {{end}}
    Swarm
    NodeID {{$detail.Swarm.NodeID}} NodeAddr {{$detail.Swarm.NodeAddr}}
    LocalNodeState {{$detail.Swarm.LocalNodeState}} ControlAvailable {{if $detail.Swarm.ControlAvailable}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    Error {{$detail.Swarm.Error}} RemoteManagers {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.Swarm.RemoteManagers}} {{end}}
    NodeID {{$vv.NodeID}} Addr {{$vv.Addr}}
    Nodes {{$detail.Swarm.Nodes}} Managers {{$detail.Swarm.Managers}}
    Cluster {{$cluster := $detail.Swarm.Cluster}} {{if $cluster}} {{- if $cluster.Spec -}} {{- end -}} {{- if $cluster.TLSInfo -}} {{- end -}}
    ID {{$cluster.ID}} Version {{$cluster.Version}}
    CreatedAt {{$cluster.CreatedAt}} UpdatedAt {{$cluster.UpdatedAt}}
    Spec 
    {{JSONEncode $cluster.Spec `  `}}
    TLSInfo 
    {{JSONEncode $cluster.TLSInfo `  `}}
    RootRotationInProgress {{if $cluster.RootRotationInProgress}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}} DefaultAddrPool {{range $kk,$vv:=$cluster.DefaultAddrPool}}{{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    SubnetSize {{$cluster.SubnetSize}} DataPathPort {{$cluster.DataPathPort}}
    {{end}}
    RegistryConfig
    AllowNondistributableArtifactsCIDRs {{$registry.AllowNondistributableArtifactsCIDRs}} AllowNondistributableArtifactsHostnames {{$registry.AllowNondistributableArtifactsHostnames}}
    InsecureRegistryCIDRs {{range $kk,$vv:=$registry.InsecureRegistryCIDRs}} {{$kk}}. {{$vv}}
    {{end}}     		Mirrors {{range $kk,$vv:=$registry.Mirrors}} {{$kk}}. {{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    {{- range $k,$v:=$registry.IndexConfigs -}} {{- end -}}
    IndexConfigs
    {{$k}}
    Name {{$v.Name}}
    Mirrors {{range $kk,$vv:=$v.Mirrors}} {{$kk}}. {{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    Secure {{if $v.Secure}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    Official {{if $v.Official}}YES{{else}}NO{{end}}
    Plugins
    Volume {{range $kk,$vv:=$plugins.Volume}} {{$vv}} {{end}} Network {{range $kk,$vv:=$plugins.Network}} {{$vv}} {{end}}
    Authorization {{range $kk,$vv:=$plugins.Authorization}} {{$vv}} {{end}} Log {{range $kk,$vv:=$plugins.Log}} {{$vv}} {{end}}
    {{/Block}} {{Block "footer"}} {{/Block}}
